Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model

Class ValidadorSudoku

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ValidadorSudoku
public class ValidadorSudoku extends Object
Validates the rules of a 6x6 Sudoku board using hash-based sets.

This class is the cornerstone of the validation logic. It exposes stateless methods that check whether a given move is valid according to the three classic Sudoku rules:

  • No number can be repeated within the same row.
  • No number can be repeated within the same column.
  • No number can be repeated within the same 2x3 block.

The implementation relies on HashSet for constant-time duplicate detection. The add() method of a HashSet returns false when the element is already present, which is leveraged here to detect repeated numbers in a single operation.

This class belongs to the model layer of the MVC architecture and does not depend on JavaFX or any UI framework.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    esMovimientoValido(int fila, int columna, int valor)
    Checks whether placing the given value at the specified position would respect all three Sudoku rules (row, column and block).
    boolean
    estaResueltoCorrectamente()
    Returns whether the board is fully completed and all values respect the Sudoku rules.
    boolean
    esValidoEnBloque(int fila, int columna, int valor)
    Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the 2x3 block containing the target cell, excluding the target cell itself.
    boolean
    esValidoEnColumna(int filaObjetivo, int columna, int valor)
    Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the column, excluding the cell at the target row.
    boolean
    esValidoEnFila(int fila, int columnaObjetivo, int valor)
    Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the row, excluding the cell at the target column (so that re-placing the same value over itself is still considered valid).
    boolean
    validarTableroCompleto()
    Validates the entire board by scanning every cell and checking whether its current value violates any rule.

  • Field Details

    • tablero

      private final TableroSudoku tablero
      The board to validate.

  • Constructor Details

    • ValidadorSudoku

      public ValidadorSudoku(TableroSudoku tablero)
      Constructs a new validator bound to a specific Sudoku board.
      Parameters:
      tablero - the board that this validator will check

  • Method Details

    • esMovimientoValido

      public boolean esMovimientoValido(int fila, int columna, int valor)
      Checks whether placing the given value at the specified position would respect all three Sudoku rules (row, column and block).

      This method does NOT modify the board. It only simulates the move to determine its validity.

      Parameters:
      fila - the row index (0-5)
      columna - the column index (0-5)
      valor - the value to place (must be between 1 and 6)
      Returns:
      true if the move respects all Sudoku rules, false otherwise

    • esValidoEnFila

      public boolean esValidoEnFila(int fila, int columnaObjetivo, int valor)
      Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the row, excluding the cell at the target column (so that re-placing the same value over itself is still considered valid).
      Parameters:
      fila - the row index to check
      columnaObjetivo - the column index of the cell being modified
      valor - the value to test
      Returns:
      true if the value can be placed without breaking the row rule

    • esValidoEnColumna

      public boolean esValidoEnColumna(int filaObjetivo, int columna, int valor)
      Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the column, excluding the cell at the target row.
      Parameters:
      filaObjetivo - the row index of the cell being modified
      columna - the column index to check
      valor - the value to test
      Returns:
      true if the value can be placed without breaking the column rule

    • esValidoEnBloque

      public boolean esValidoEnBloque(int fila, int columna, int valor)
      Verifies that the given value does not already appear in the 2x3 block containing the target cell, excluding the target cell itself.
      Parameters:
      fila - the row index of the target cell
      columna - the column index of the target cell
      valor - the value to test
      Returns:
      true if the value can be placed without breaking the block rule

    • validarTableroCompleto

      public boolean validarTableroCompleto()
      Validates the entire board by scanning every cell and checking whether its current value violates any rule.

      After this method runs, each cell will have its error flag updated: cells with conflicting values will have tieneError == true.

      Returns:
      true if no cell violates any rule, false if at least one error was detected

    • estaResueltoCorrectamente

      public boolean estaResueltoCorrectamente()
      Returns whether the board is fully completed and all values respect the Sudoku rules.
      Returns:
      true if the board is solved correctly
